parameters.sqlQuery:
SELECT client_id, slug, currency, timezone, country
FROM `oneeighty-warehouse.ref.clients`
WHERE status='active' AND has_shopify=TRUE

SELECT
  COALESCE(
    FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%Ez',
      TIMESTAMP_SUB(MAX(updated_at), INTERVAL 1 DAY)),
    FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%Ez',
      TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 24 MONTH))
  ) AS updated_at_min
FROM `oneeighty-warehouse.raw.raw_shopify_orders`
WHERE client_id = '{{ $json.client_id }}'
  AND order_date >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE(), INTERVAL 24 MONTH)

INSERT INTO `oneeighty-warehouse.ops.pipeline_log`
  (run_id, workflow, client_id, source, started_at, finished_at, status, trigger)
VALUES (
  '{{ $execution.id }}',
  'wf_shopify',
  '{{ $('Decode secrets').item.json.client_id }}',
  'shopify',
  TIMESTAMP('{{ $execution.startedAt }}'),
  CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(),
  'success',
  'cron'
)
